//: The ttsc/Go plugin config read by @ttsc/unplugin/bun during the Bun.build emit (build.ts): src/main.ts needs BOTH registration and addOptions<T>() lowering. Both descriptors resolve to the SAME single owner host (transforms/cmd/ttsc-std), so ttsc dedupes them to one spawn; the host runs each declared stage in canonical order — no aggregate descriptor needed. Extends the tspc tsconfig but swaps the plugins for the two `/ttsc` descriptors. The ts-patch `types` augmentations are RETAINED (they were previously dropped, but declaration-site matching anchors each authored form on its `declare module '@rhombus-std/di.core'` sugar overload, so the augment must be in the Go program too — the tokenless `add`/`as`/`resolve` sugar declarations live ONLY in di.transformer's augment). @types/bun keeps the Generic Host's process/node:* surface resolved. Lint stays on typescript 5 (tspc --noEmit) via the base tsconfig.json.
